name: Stuffed French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet or electric frying pan, fry the bacon and breakfast sausage together but separately until done.
2. While the meat is cooking, slice the French bread into eight slices about 1-2 inches thick. Then slice each slice about three-quarters of the way through again.
3. Mix the milk, eggs, sugar, cinnamon, and vanilla together in a deep bowl and set aside.
4. Take up the bacon and sausage and divide each into eight equal parts. Do the same with the ham.
5. Dip each piece of bread into the batter and submerge it so that both sides and edges are coated.
6. Open each piece and put one portion of the meat, bacon, and ham along with one slice of cheese inside. Close the bread again.
7. Fry the stuffed, batter-coated bread slices in the skillet or electric frying pan that has been coated with PAM or other suitable non-stick agent until golden brown on the outside and the cheese is melted on the inside.
8. Serve two slices per plate with your favorite garnishes and condiments (e.g., home fries, maple syrup, confectioner's sugar, etc.).
